title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
